notes: Clean codebase, zero HTML DOM anti-patterns. Only document.getElementById for IWSDK container.

details: Up to 4 simultaneous balls, ball-ball elastic collisions, per-ball collision processing, spawn/cleanup lifecycle
2 spinner obstacles (center + left orbit), visual rotation with friction decay, speed-responsive glow, metallic whirr SFX
Left and right ramps, entry/exit teleport, combo scoring system, consecutive ramp bonus, super ramp, ramp trail particles, swoosh SFX
Left/right outlanes with one-time kickback saves, visual indicators green/red, kickback spring SFX
All targets = lock ball, 3 locks + ramp = multiball, extra ball spawning, multiball jackpot, pulsing bass music, power-up SFX
5 mission types (Ramp Runner, Bumper Frenzy, Target Blitz, Spin City, Multiball Madness), progressive objectives, mission HUD panel, mission complete fanfare
Lane arrows, backbox sign with neon emblem, increased particle limits
